data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhancing account security by requiring two-step verification for user access.
data.technical_spec: Uses SMS and email verification processes.

data.title: Encryption at Rest and Transit
data.description: Protecting user data with encryption methods both at rest and during transit.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption and TLS for data security.

data.title: Threat Monitoring
data.description: Continuous monitoring for potential threats and unauthorized activities.
data.technical_spec: Utilizing AI-powered tools for anomaly detection.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Defending against Distributed Denial of Service attacks to maintain service availability.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield Advanced and proprietary filtering algorithms.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Incentivizing external developers to identify and report security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Managed through platforms like HackerOne and Bugcrowd.
